title: PRMP vs Attention-Based Aggregation (GATConv) Comparison on Amazon Video Games
summary: Demo notebook comparing 4 heterogeneous GNN variants (HeteroSAGE, HeteroGAT, PRMP+SAGE, PRMP+GAT) on Amazon Video Games review-rating regression. Implements all GNN layers in pure PyTorch (no torch-geometric). The notebook defines scatter-based message passing layers, builds synthetic heterogeneous graphs for forward pass and training demos, and visualizes pre-computed experiment results (50K reviews, 3 seeds × 200 epochs) including RMSE/MAE/R2 metrics, parameter counts, per-seed distributions, and pairwise Cohen's d effect size heatmaps. Uses 50 curated examples from the full experiment output.
